svg.title: STAR research workflow — thirteen skills in order, two that read across them, and what each one writes
svg.text: Fifteen skills · thirteen in order and two that read across them · what each one writes · how the loop closes
An already-started project wired in, nothing moved

g.text: A vague interest → a defensible topic
An idea → a plan, one question at a time
The closest work, transcribed from fetched records
A code home for the plan, architecture recorded
The runtime built from .env and smoke-verified
The plan split into verifiable leaf sub-plans
The flow read; what is owed and the one next action
Code audited against conventions and the plan
The run scored against the plan’s done-criteria
The period read; what ran, what moved, what is owed
Execution evidence folded back into the plan
The matured plan tree compiled into method docs
reads the plan tree — and every other artifact
STOP line — you run the command, then re-invoke
reads every stage · run it at any time
→ 7 → 9 is the light path per leaf. The full path adds 8 and 10.
